events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario: ladder reinforcement spacing exceeded in block/brick laying, industrial site, rough-complete, reference TMS 402/602. Ladder reinforcement spacing exceeded means non-compliant with code/spec. Decision must be fail if dangerous or non-compliant. Risk? Reinforcement spacing affects structural capacity, crack control. Could be medium/high. In masonry walls, ladder reinforcement spacing per TMS 602 likely max 16 inches vertically? Actually joint reinforcement spacing per TMS 402/602: max spacing 16 in. o.c. unless otherwise specified. Exceeded spacing reduces strength. Industrial site heavy loads, so high risk maybe. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 80. Findings: ladder reinforcement spacing exceeds allowable limits. Actions: remove/replace or add supplemental reinforcement, verify spacing per drawings/specs, reinspect. Rationale: TMS 402/602 limits spacing of joint reinforcement; exceeding it violates code and reduces wall capacity. References: TMS 402/602. Need include all fields. value 0, sound_source empty? Schema string. Could use "". event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order empty list, workable empty list. Confidence 0.95. Ensure valid JSON.

  "rationale": "TMS 402/602 and typical project specifications limit the spacing of masonry joint/ladder reinforcement. Exceeding that spacing reduces wall tensile capacity, crack control, and structural performance, making the installation non-compliant and defective.",
